message:
feat(harness): resize storm testing and dialog snapshots

New modules:
- resize_storm.rs: Resize storm simulation for stress testing

Updates:
- Cargo.toml: Updated dependencies
- main.rs: Harness entry point enhancements
- editor_perf.rs: Editor performance test adjustments

New snapshots:
- dialog_alert_80x24.snap
- dialog_confirm_80x24.snap
- dialog_custom_80x24.snap
- dialog_prompt_80x24.snap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@ publish = false
 [features]
 default = []
 pty-capture = ["dep:portable-pty", "ftui-extras/pty-capture"]
+telemetry = ["ftui-runtime/telemetry"]
 
 [dependencies]
 ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render" }
